task: Using only the provided embedded packet, detect and quarantine potential evaluation leakage in the benchmark corpus; produce a reproducible notebook and a concise technical memo that (1) preserves all intermediate calculations and executable logic, (2) produces a decision table with baseline, mitigated, and sensitivity cases, (3) includes record-level citations, validation checks, and sensitivity notes, and (4) gives a final recommendation that stays inside the provided budget and improves the controlling metric by at least 10%. Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must be derived solely from the embedded packet.
